subject: chore(cleanup): drop unused Z_CLASS export and stale USER_ACTIONS entries
body:
The Z_CLASS lookup in src/constants/zIndex.ts was exported but never
imported; JSX continues to use Tailwind utilities directly so the JIT
sees the classes statically. Comment now documents why the table was
intentionally not introduced.

USER_ACTIONS.md drops four "Status: Done" entries (VITE_API_BASE_URL,
three migrations) per the new "delete completed items — git history
tracks them" rule we just adopted from glow-props. Active items
(re-enable auth, configure Google OAuth) stay.

Tags: cleanup, refactor, docs
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
title: drop unused Z_CLASS export and stale USER_ACTIONS entries
